inputs: The artists say the plan will harm French culture and punish those who need help most--performers who have a hard time lining up work.
context: （基本原則） 第一条 私権は、公共の福祉に適合しなければならない。 ２ 権利の行使及び義務の履行は、信義に従い誠実に行わなければならない。 ３ 権利の濫用は、これを許さない。
references: Artists are worried the plan would harm those who need help most - performers who have a difficult time lining up shows.
